title: Expanded Arsenal
description: Adds a good amount of weapons to Minecraft!
body:
Expanded Arsenal is a Minecraft mod that adds more weapons, making fight more engaging!
All the weapons in the mod are craftable, which means you can use them in survival.
The mod also has Better Combat animations!

**NEOFORGE MUST BE 21.1.176**  
**THIS MOD REQUIRES BETTER COMBAT!**
Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat

The mod adds the following:

Two new crafting ingredients: Greatsword handle and Longstick

- Greatswords
- Battleaxes
- Spears
- Halberds
- Daggers
- Twinblades

- And 6 more weapons with Special Abilities!

![The Expanded Arsenal Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52eef4d87d01e3a3981a053258d157ad6b387f10.png)
